'''Elta Besk''' was the head of [[Dynamic Automata]], a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] design and manufacturing corporation. She inherited the role from her father, [[Metron Besk]], who founded the company.

==Biography==
Shortly after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], Besk was invited to the [[Pentastar Talks]] aboard the [[Reaper (Executor-class)|''Reaper'']]. Imperial [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Ardus Kaine]], the convenor of the talks, was proposing the formation of the [[Pentastar Alignment]]. Besk agreed with his proposals out of concern that the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] focus on freedom could lead to a revolt among the largely [[Entymal]] slave labor used by her corporation.
